headline: GSK Buys Nuvalent for $10.6 Billion in Major Cancer Push
summary: (Bloomberg) -- GSK Plc agreed to buy Nuvalent Inc. for $10.6 billion, securing a US biotech firm developing treatments for lung cancer as part of the British pharmaceutical company’s effort to rebuild its oncology franchise.Most Read from BloombergHouse Republican Says Hegseth’s D-Day Remarks ‘Inappropriate’LA Mayor Race Flips as Socialist Beats Reality TV Star PrattTrump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Application Fee Rejected by JudgeTrump Says He, Not Congress, Is in Charge of Kennedy Center in Reversal

content.title: GSK Buys Nuvalent for $10.6 Billion in Major Cancer Push
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- GSK Plc agreed to buy Nuvalent Inc. for $10.6 billion, securing a US biotech firm developing treatments for lung cancer as part of the British pharmaceutical company’s effort to rebuild its oncology franchise.Most Read from BloombergHouse Republican Says Hegseth’s D-Day Remarks ‘Inappropriate’LA Mayor Race Flips as Socialist Beats Reality TV Star PrattTrump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Application Fee Rejected by JudgeTrump Says He, Not Congress, Is in Charge of Kennedy Center in Reversal
